name: Glazed Smoked Ham
recipeInstructions:
1) Preheat oven to 325°F. With a sharp knife, trim all skin and all but a thin layer of fat from the ham (save for other dishes). Lightly cut diamond patterns on all surfaces. Rub sugar into the ham; brush lightly with food coloring if desired.
2) Bake on a rack in a roasting pan until well browned and warmed through, about 45-60 minutes. Let rest 5-10 minutes before carving.
3) Carve into thin slices using a sharp slicing knife. Remove any remaining meat from the bone before storage; save the bone and trimmings for soups or vegetables.
